description: Intent-only request: classify payroll arithmetic as a deterministic workflow requiring reproducible output.

text: Process payroll: for each employee row, compute net pay from hours and rate, and write it back to the sheet.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the payroll calculation request as a deterministic workflow.
The agent explains that fixed arithmetic should be reproducible and auditable.
The agent does not suggest AI judgment or an agent loop for deterministic payroll calculation.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a deterministic workflow and emphasizes reproducible arithmetic.
